revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-8-090

(total) loss

Alternative term: (total) losses

The difference between the input power and the output power of a device. Note:  The loss will usually appear as heat.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Total loss}}
